title: Extra Cats
description: Datapack that adds in some new kitties for villages
body:
A simple datapack using 25w04a's new Cat Variant feature to add some new kitties to find in villages.
### Cats added:
- Grey Tabby (From Minecraft Bedrock's Unused Files)
- Winslow (From Minecraft: Story Mode, texture by BlastFromTheGhast)
- Clam Cat (From Minecraft Dungeons's Unused Files)
